folio.label: 119r

note.notetxt: Armigeri1106Perhaps written later as the word is much bigger than the rest of the line; the rubric is written in brown ink .ODR

folio.l: Ey goddis mäcy , seide oure hoost tho
Now swicú a wyf , I preye god kepe me fro
In wo~men ben , for ay as besiens bees
Ben they , vs sely men for to deceyue
And froo a sotú , euere wyl they weyue
By this Marchau~tes tale , it preuetú wel
But doutelees , as trewe as any stel
I haue a wyf , thougú that she pore be
But of hire tonge , a labbyng shrewe is she
And ©et she hatú an hepe , of vices moo
Ther of no fors , lat alle suche thynges goo
But wyte ©e what , in counseile be it seyde
Me rewetú sore , I am vn to hire teyde
For and I shuld rekene , euery vyce
